name: SomeIpSDDesubscribeEventGroup
title: SomeIpSDDesubscribeEventGroup
description: The Event Group is unregistered at the node (consumer). The existing subscription is terminated (Stop Subscribe Eventgroup is sent). The associated Service Discovery message (Subscribe Eventgroup) is then no longer sent by the node.
The Event Group and all assigned Events, fields, and methods are not deleted when unregistered.

parameters.name: cevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Consumed Event Group (see SomeIpAddConsumedEventGroup).
